marketplace.name: Whack-a-Monkey
marketplace.description: Tap the monkeys as they peek out, leave the jungle animals alone.

ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area.

headerTime.name: Time label
headerTime.description: Label preceding the countdown clock (seconds left) in the header.

headerGoal.name: Goal label
headerGoal.description: Label preceding the monkeys-whacked / goal counter in the header.

headerLevel.name: Level label
headerLevel.description: Label preceding the current level number in the header.

headerScore.name: Score label
headerScore.description: Label preceding the points score in the header.

startTitle.name: Start screen title
startTitle.description: Headline shown on the start screen before the first round.

startBody.name: Start screen body
startBody.description: Short instructions shown on the start screen.

startButton.name: Start button
startButton.description: Label for the button that begins the round.

controlsHint.name: Controls hint
controlsHint.description: Small reminder of what to tap, shown under the start button.

winTitle.name: Success title
winTitle.description: Headline shown when the player taps enough monkeys with clean aim to pass.

winBody.name: Success body
winBody.description: Line shown on the success screen with the final score.

overTitle.name: Round over title
overTitle.description: Headline shown when the round ends without passing (the clock ran out).

overBody.name: Round over body
overBody.description: Line shown on the round-over screen inviting another attempt.

retryButton.name: Retry button
retryButton.description: Label for the button that restarts after a win or a round-over.

ariaSound.name: Sound toggle label
ariaSound.description: Accessible label for the in-game button that turns sound on / off.

verifiedBadge.name: Verified badge
verifiedBadge.description: Short label shown in the header once the player has passed; the round then ends.

announceStart.name: Announcer: round started
announceStart.description: Live-region message when the round begins.

announceHit.name: Announcer: monkey tapped
announceHit.description: Live-region message after a monkey is tapped.

announceDecoy.name: Announcer: wrong animal tapped
announceDecoy.description: Live-region message when the player taps a decoy animal.

announceLevel.name: Announcer: level up
announceLevel.description: Live-region message when the player clears a level.

announceWin.name: Announcer: verified
announceWin.description: Live-region message when the player passes.

announceOver.name: Announcer: round over
announceOver.description: Live-region message when the round ends without passing.

English.ariaGame: Tap the monkeys as they peek out of the bushes and leave the other jungle animals alone. Tap enough monkeys with clean aim to verify you are human.
English.startBody: Tap the monkeys as they peek out of the bushes. Leave the other jungle animals alone. Tap enough monkeys, and keep your aim clean, to verify you are human.
English.controlsHint: Tap the monkeys, not the other animals
English.overBody: Out of time. You scored {score}. Give it another go.

中文.ariaGame: 猴子从草丛里探头时把它拍下去，别碰其他丛林动物。瞄得准、拍够数，即可验证你是真人。
中文.startBody: 猴子从草丛里探头时把它拍下去，别碰其他丛林动物。拍够数量并保持瞄得准，即可验证你是真人。
中文.winBody: 瞄得真准！你得了 {score} 分。
中文.overBody: 时间到了。你得了 {score} 分。再来一局吧。
中文.announceWin: 已验证。你得了 {score} 分。做得好。
中文.announceOver: 本局结束。你得了 {score} 分。

Español.ariaGame: Dale a los monos cuando asomen por los arbustos y no toques a los demás animales de la selva. Acierta a suficientes monos con buena puntería para verificar que eres humano.
Español.startBody: Dale a los monos cuando asomen por los arbustos. No toques a los demás animales de la selva. Acierta a suficientes monos, con buena puntería, para verificar que eres humano.
Español.controlsHint: Dale a los monos, no a los demás animales
Español.overBody: Se acabó el tiempo. Hiciste {score} puntos. Inténtalo otra vez.
Español.announceOver: Fin de la ronda. Hiciste {score} puntos.

العربية.ariaGame: اضرب القرود حين تطلّ من الأدغال، واترك بقية حيوانات الغابة وشأنها. اضرب ما يكفي من القرود بتصويب دقيق لتثبت أنك إنسان.
العربية.startBody: اضرب القرود حين تطلّ من الأدغال، واترك بقية حيوانات الغابة وشأنها. اضرب ما يكفي منها بتصويب دقيق لتثبت أنك إنسان.
العربية.overBody: انتهى الوقت. سجّلت {score} نقطة. حاول مرة أخرى.

Português.ariaGame: Acerte nos macacos quando eles aparecem dos arbustos e deixe os outros animais da selva em paz. Acerte macacos suficientes com boa mira para confirmar que você é humano.
Português.startBody: Acerte nos macacos quando eles aparecem dos arbustos. Deixe os outros animais da selva em paz. Acerte macacos suficientes, e mantenha a mira boa, para confirmar que você é humano.
Português.controlsHint: Acerte nos macacos, não nos outros animais
Português.overBody: Acabou o tempo. Você fez {score} pontos. Tente de novo.
Português.announceWin: Confirmado. Você fez {score} pontos. Mandou bem!
Português.announceOver: Fim da rodada. Você fez {score} pontos.

Français.ariaGame: Tape sur les singes quand ils sortent des buissons et laisse les autres animaux de la jungle tranquilles. Touche assez de singes avec une visée nette pour prouver que tu es humain.
Français.startBody: Tape sur les singes quand ils sortent des buissons. Laisse les autres animaux de la jungle tranquilles. Touche assez de singes, en gardant une visée nette, pour prouver que tu es humain.
Français.controlsHint: Tape sur les singes, pas sur les autres animaux
Français.winBody: Belle visée ! Tu as fait {score} points.
Français.overBody: Temps écoulé. Tu as fait {score} points. Retente ta chance.
Français.announceWin: Vérifié. Tu as fait {score} points. Bien joué.
Français.announceOver: Fin de la manche. Tu as fait {score} points.

Deutsch.ariaGame: Hau auf die Affen, wenn sie aus den Büschen lugen, und lass die anderen Dschungeltiere in Ruhe. Triff genug Affen mit sauberem Ziel, um zu bestätigen, dass du ein Mensch bist.
Deutsch.startBody: Hau auf die Affen, wenn sie aus den Büschen lugen. Lass die anderen Dschungeltiere in Ruhe. Triff genug Affen, und ziel dabei sauber, um zu bestätigen, dass du ein Mensch bist.
Deutsch.controlsHint: Hau auf die Affen, nicht auf die anderen Tiere
Deutsch.winBody: Sauber gezielt! Du hast {score} Punkte gemacht.
Deutsch.overBody: Zeit abgelaufen. Du hast {score} Punkte gemacht. Versuch es noch mal.
Deutsch.announceWin: Bestätigt. Du hast {score} Punkte gemacht. Gut gemacht.
Deutsch.announceOver: Runde vorbei. Du hast {score} Punkte gemacht.

Русский.ariaGame: Бей обезьянок, когда они выглядывают из кустов, а других обитателей джунглей не трогай. Попади по достаточному числу обезьянок с точным прицелом, чтобы подтвердить, что ты человек.
Русский.startBody: Бей обезьянок, когда они выглядывают из кустов. Других обитателей джунглей не трогай. Попади по достаточному числу обезьянок, целясь точно, чтобы подтвердить, что ты человек.
Русский.controlsHint: Бей обезьянок, а не других зверей
Русский.overBody: Время вышло. Ты набрал {score} очков. Попробуй ещё раз.

日本語.ariaGame: 茂みから顔を出すサルを叩き、ほかのジャングルの動物には触れないでください。狙いを外さず十分に叩けば人間だと認証されます。
日本語.startBody: 茂みから顔を出すサルを叩きましょう。ほかのジャングルの動物には触れないでください。狙いを外さず十分に叩けば人間だと認証されます。
日本語.controlsHint: サルだけを叩く、ほかの動物は叩かない
日本語.winBody: 見事な狙い！{score} 点を獲得しました。
日本語.overBody: 時間切れです。{score} 点を獲得しました。もう一度どうぞ。
日本語.announceWin: 認証完了。{score} 点を獲得しました。お見事。
日本語.announceOver: ラウンド終了。{score} 点を獲得しました。

한국어.ariaGame: 수풀에서 고개를 내미는 원숭이를 치고, 다른 정글 동물은 건드리지 마세요. 정확히 겨눠 원숭이를 충분히 치면 사람임을 인증합니다.
한국어.startBody: 수풀에서 고개를 내미는 원숭이를 치세요. 다른 정글 동물은 건드리지 마세요. 정확히 겨눠 원숭이를 충분히 치면 사람임을 인증합니다.
한국어.controlsHint: 원숭이만 치고 다른 동물은 치지 마세요
한국어.overBody: 시간이 다 됐어요. {score} 점을 얻었어요. 다시 도전해 보세요.

Bahasa Indonesia.ariaGame: Pukul monyet saat mereka mengintip dari semak, dan biarkan hewan hutan lainnya. Pukul cukup banyak monyet dengan bidikan yang tepat untuk membuktikan kamu manusia.
Bahasa Indonesia.startBody: Pukul monyet saat mereka mengintip dari semak. Biarkan hewan hutan lainnya. Pukul cukup banyak monyet, dan jaga bidikanmu tetap tepat, untuk membuktikan kamu manusia.
Bahasa Indonesia.overBody: Waktu habis. Kamu meraih {score} poin. Coba lagi, yuk.

bg.name: Background
bg.description: Stage background, full-bleed behind the play field.

fg.name: Foreground
fg.description: Header text and generic foreground color.

canopy_top.name: Canopy top
canopy_top.description: Top color of the jungle background gradient.

canopy_bottom.name: Canopy bottom
canopy_bottom.description: Bottom color of the jungle background gradient.

foliage.name: Foliage
foliage.description: Tint of the bushes the monkeys peek out from behind.

foliage_dark.name: Distant foliage
foliage_dark.description: Tint of the darker, distant foliage layer drawn for depth.

good_tint.name: Hit particles
good_tint.description: Color of the burst particles when a monkey is tapped.

decoy_flash.name: Decoy flash
decoy_flash.description: Overlay color flashed when the player taps the wrong animal.

button_bg.name: Primary button bg
button_bg.description: Background of the Start / Try again primary button.

button_hover.name: Primary button hover bg
button_hover.description: Hover background of the primary button.

focus_ring.name: Focus ring
focus_ring.description: Outline shown on buttons / the stage when keyboard focus enters.

art_monkey.name: Monkey art (optional)
art_monkey.description: Optional image drawn for the monkey target instead of the built-in sprite. Absent means the bundled sprite is used.

art_frog.name: Frog decoy art (optional)
art_frog.description: Optional image drawn for the frog decoy instead of the built-in sprite.

art_parrot.name: Parrot decoy art (optional)
art_parrot.description: Optional image drawn for the parrot decoy instead of the built-in sprite.

art_snake.name: Snake decoy art (optional)
art_snake.description: Optional image drawn for the snake decoy instead of the built-in sprite.

art_sloth.name: Sloth decoy art (optional)
art_sloth.description: Optional image drawn for the sloth decoy instead of the built-in sprite.

pass_hits.name: Pass goal
pass_hits.description: Number of monkeys a round must whack to count as a pass, spread across the levels.

base_uptime_ms.name: Mole uptime
base_uptime_ms.description: How long a monkey stays up on level 1, in milliseconds. Shorter is harder. Later levels shorten it further, with a fair floor.

base_decoy_chance.name: Decoy chance
base_decoy_chance.description: Probability a pop-up is a decoy animal (do not tap) on level 1. Later levels raise it, up to a cap.

seconds.name: Round time
seconds.description: Seconds on the clock to whack the goal number of monkeys. A wrong tap knocks 2 seconds off; running out before the goal loses the round.

sound.name: Sound effects
sound.description: Play whack / miss / verify sound effects. Players can also toggle sound with the in-game mute button.

show_score.name: Show counters
show_score.description: Display the monkeys-whacked goal counter and the level in the header.
